title: React Frontend Developer for E-commerce Platform
description: We need an experienced React developer to build a modern e-commerce platform. The project involves creating responsive components, integrating payment gateways, and implementing user authentication. Must have experience with Redux, React Router, and modern CSS frameworks.

title: Node.js Backend API Development
description: Looking for a skilled Node.js developer to create RESTful APIs for our mobile application. Requirements include MongoDB integration, JWT authentication, and comprehensive API documentation. Experience with Express.js and cloud deployment preferred.

title: Brand Identity Design Package
description: Seeking a creative graphic designer to develop a complete brand identity for our startup. This includes logo design, color palette, typography, business cards, and brand guidelines. Portfolio with similar work required.

title: SEO Content Writer for Tech Blog
description: We need a skilled content writer to create SEO-optimized blog posts for our technology website. Must have experience writing about software development, AI, and emerging technologies. 10 articles per month, 1500+ words each.

title: Social Media Marketing Campaign
description: Looking for a digital marketing expert to manage our social media presence across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Includes content creation, posting schedule, engagement management, and monthly analytics reports.

title: Data Analysis for Sales Performance
description: Need a data analyst to analyze our sales data and create comprehensive reports with insights and recommendations. Must be proficient in Python, SQL, and data visualization tools. Experience with e-commerce data preferred.

title: iOS Mobile App Development
description: Seeking an experienced iOS developer to build a fitness tracking mobile app. Features include user registration, workout tracking, progress charts, and social sharing. Must have App Store publishing experience.

title: Product Demo Video Creation
description: We need a professional video editor to create a 2-minute product demonstration video for our SaaS platform. Includes screen recording, voiceover integration, motion graphics, and background music. High-quality output required.

title: UI/UX Design for Mobile Banking App
description: Looking for a talented UI/UX designer to redesign our mobile banking application. Focus on user experience, accessibility, and modern design principles. Must provide wireframes, prototypes, and design system documentation.

title: WordPress SEO Optimization
description: Need an SEO specialist to optimize our WordPress website for better search engine rankings. Includes keyword research, on-page optimization, technical SEO audit, and content recommendations. Must provide detailed reports.
